title: Tempting Tartiflette
description: A French-inspired tartiflette recipe featuring a rich, savory tartiflette topped with toasted bread and tempting cheese. Serve as a satisfying dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: Tempting cheese
ingredients.notes: such as vegan mozzarella or soy cheese

instructions: 2. Slice the French bread into 1cm thick slices.
3. Brush each bread slice with olive oil.
4. Bake the bread in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until toasted and golden brown.
5. Meanwhile, prepare the tartiflette according to package instructions.
6. Assemble the tartiflette by spreading a layer of tartiflette on each bread slice.
7. Top with tempting cheese and sprinkle with salt to taste.
8. Bake in the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
